'''Vermilic''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]]. In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], a young Vermilic Hutt disintegrated one of his clan [[Hutt counselor|counselors]], violating one of the [[Hutt Commercial Laws]]. As a result, trafficking with other Hutt clans ceased for three months and the Vermilic clan was bankrupted.<ref name="HaS">{{StoryCite|story=Hutt and Seek|book=Tales from the New Republic}}</ref>
